plugins.name: svg-logo
plugins.description: Generate a production-ready SVG logo mark — icon only, no text, with optional animation.

plugins.name: svg-flowchart
plugins.description: Generate a production-ready SVG flowchart or process diagram (800px wide, auto height).

plugins.name: svg-illustration
plugins.description: Generate a production-ready SVG illustration or scene (400×300 default canvas).
